SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_TRMNTD_IND 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_TRMNTD_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
The value of this variable will be 1 (“Yes”) when PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD (variable in the APR 
enrollment file) equals “60”–“83.”
